name: io.github.samik081/mcp-pve
title: Proxmox VE MCP Server
description: MCP server for Proxmox VE — manage virtual machines, containers, storage, networking, and clusters through AI coding tools

environment_variables.name: PVE_BASE_URL
environment_variables.description: URL of the Proxmox VE instance (e.g. https://pve.example.com:8006)

environment_variables.name: PVE_TOKEN_ID
environment_variables.description: Proxmox VE API token ID (e.g. user@pam!token-name)
